name: lab-results-explainer
description: Patient-friendly AI lab results explainer built with React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Node.js, and OpenAI.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @lab-results/shared build && concurrently --raw --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter api dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 -t 30000 && pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @lab-results/shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
